final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration in cel-shaded thick-paint anime style, featuring a Western-style light-makeup beauty girl in a rebalanced scene.

Style/medium: cel-shaded thick-paint anime illustration,赛璐璐厚涂, semi-realistic anime aesthetic with soft painted textures
Composition: balanced two-character scene with items repositioned for spatial harmony, medium shot framing
Subject: girl with Western-style light makeup, delicate features, natural beauty, soft expression,赛璐璐厚涂 style rendering
Scene/backdrop: interior or outdoor setting with props rearranged for visual balance, complementary environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, gentle atmosphere, warm and inviting mood
Color palette: harmonious anime color scheme with soft skin tones and balanced accent colors
Materials/textures: painted anime style with visible brushwork texture, smooth cel-shaded gradients
Constraints: maintain赛璐璐厚涂 aesthetic throughout, ensure Western light-makeup beauty standards for the girl character
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D CGI look, deformed anatomy, cluttered composition, harsh lighting
